items.title: NBA Game 5 Highlights: Pistons 116, Magic 109
items.blurb: NBA Game 5 Highlights: Pistons 116, Magic 109 — Cade Cunningham carried the offensive load with 45 points on 23 shots, Tobias Harris added 23 points with eight rebounds, and the Detroit Pistons secured a 116-109 win in Game 5 over the Orlando Magic.

items.title: Cunningham stars as Pistons beat Magic in Game 5 to stave off elimination
items.blurb: Cunningham stars as Pistons beat Magic in Game 5 to stave off elimination — Cade Cunningham scored a franchise playoff record 45 points, including a step-back jumper with 32 seconds left, and the top-seeded Detroit Pistons beat the eighth-seeded Orlando Magic 116-109 on Wednesday night in Game 5 of their first-round series to stave off elimination.

items.title: Pistons avoid elimination vs. Magic behind Cade Cunningham's historic performance

items.title: Brad Stevens Wins NBA Executive Of The Year For Second Time
items.blurb: Brad Stevens Wins NBA Executive Of The Year For Second Time — Boston Celtics President of Basketball Operations Brad Stevens has been named the 2025-26 NBA Basketball Executive of the Year. Stevens claimed the award for the second time, having previously won it in 2023-24. Stevens earned 69 total points in voting, collecting 11 first-place votes, four second-place votes and two third-place votes.
